description: Perform a customer cohort retention analysis on the Chinook SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db (connection name 'ChinookCohort'). Group customers by their first purchase month (CohortMonth) and calculate the percentage of customers who made a purchase in subsequent months (MonthNumber 0, 1, 2...). Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/exports/cohort_retention.csv with columns 'CohortMonth', 'MonthNumber', 'CohortSize', 'ActiveCustomers', and 'RetentionPct'. Save the SQL script to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/cohort_analysis.sql and a summary of the largest cohort and overall trends to /home/ga/Documents/exports/cohort_summary.txt.
